transcript: Speaker A: English baralwa? Kelasa bekaa ninge? Illella nimmanthorge kelasa lilla. [Don't you know English? Do you want a job? There is no job for people like you here.] Speaker B: Ishtu dukhavagiddu yaake? [Why are you so sad?] Speaker C: Ella sati qualify maadtini, kelasa kooda chennag barutte. Aadre English inda yaavaglu reject aagtini. [I qualify every time, I do the work well too. But because of English, I always get rejected.] Speaker B: Idu tumba common aagide mattu practice maadidre idanna fix maadbahudu. Ivattu naavu illinda shuru maadona. [This is very common and with practice, this can be fixed. Today we will start from here.] Speaker C: Okay. Speaker B: Nimma bagge nanage heli. [Tell me about yourself.] Speaker C: Nan hesaru Priya. Nanage mooru varshada experience ide customer handling alli. Hard working kooda iddini. [My name is Priya. I have three years of experience in customer handling. I am also hard working.] Speaker B: Idanna heege heli, 'I am Priya. I have three years of experience in customer handling and I am a very hardworking person.' [Say it like this, 'I am Priya. I have three years of experience in customer handling and I am a very hardworking person.'] Speaker C: Wow! Idu tumba easy ittu. [Wow! This was very easy.] Speaker B: Naanu nimma jothe 24 gante available irtini. Yaavaga bekaadru 15 minutes practice maadidre saaku. [I will be available with you 24 hours. Just practicing for 15 minutes whenever you want is enough.] Speaker C: Naan esht dinadalli chennagi English maatado tara aagtini? [In how many days will I be able to speak English well?] Speaker B: Kevala 20 dina nanna jothe practice maadi. Neevu nanage yaavude question heli, naanu nimge English nalli answer kododanna kalistini mattu tappugalanna real teacher tara correct maadtini. [Just practice with me for 20 days. You ask me any question, I will teach you how to answer in English and correct mistakes like a real teacher.] Speaker C: Haudaa? Aadre idella keli dubaari ide anstide. [Really? But hearing all this, it feels expensive.] Speaker B: Bilkul illa, sirf 2 rupayi per day alli 7 dinagala trial maadbahudu. [Not at all, you can take a 7-day trial for just 2 rupees per day.] Speaker C: Haudaa? Naan igle SpeakX app download maadtini. [Really? I will download the SpeakX app right now.]
on_screen_text: English baralwa? [Don't you know English?] Kelasa bekaa ninge? [Do you want a job?] Illella nimmanthorge kelasa lilla. [There is no job for people like you here.] Ishtu dukhavagiddu yaake? [Why are you so sad?] Ella sati qualify maadtini, [I qualify every time,] kelasa kooda chennag barutte. [I do the work well too.] Aadre English inda [But because of English] yaavaglu reject aagtini. [I always get rejected.] Idu tumba common aagide [This is very common] mattu practice maadidre [and with practice] idanna fix maadbahudu. [this can be fixed.] Ivattu naavu illinda [Today we from here] shuru maadona. [will start.] Nimma bagge nanage heli. [Tell me about yourself.] Nan hesaru Priya. [My name is Priya.] Nanage mooru varshada [I have three years of] experience ide customer [experience in customer] handling alli. [handling.] Hard working kooda iddini. [I am also hard working.] Idanna heege heli, [Say it like this,] I am Priya. I have three years of experience in customer handling and I am a very hardworking person. Wow! Idu tumba easy ittu. [Wow! This was very easy.] Naanu nimma jothe [I with you] ippattnaalku gante [twenty-four hours] available irtini. [will be available.] Yaavaga bekaadru [Whenever you want] fifteen minutes practice maadidre saaku. [is enough.] Naan esht dina [In how many days] dalli chennagi English [will I speak English well] maatado tara aagtini? [like that?] Kevala ippattu dina [Just twenty days] nanna jothe practice maadi. [practice with me.] Neevu nanage yaavude [You ask me any] question heli, [question,] Naanu nimge English [I will teach you English] nalli answer kododanna [answering] kalistini mattu tappugalanna [and correct mistakes] real teacher tara [like a real teacher] correct maadtini. [will correct.] Houdaa? Aadre [Really? But] idella keli dubaari [hearing all this, expensive] ide anstide. [it feels.] Bilkul illa, [Not at all,] sirf 2 rupayi per day [just 2 rupees per day] alli 7 dinagala [in 7 days] trial maadbahudu. [trial can be done.] Houdaa? [Really?] Naan igle SpeakX app [I will download SpeakX app] download maadtini. [right now.] Download SpeakX App, Start 7 Days Trial Now
summary: A job seeker rejected for poor English gets help from a SpeakX AI mentor. The AI corrects her phrasing and offers 24/7 practice to build confidence in 20 days. The ad promotes a 7-day trial for 2 rupees per day.
